headline: Medical volunteers help keep the camp environment safer, steadier, and more supportive
subheadline: Medical staff are a vital part of the Summer Camp team, helping campers receive the health support and practical care that allow fuller participation in camp life.

sections.title: Health support with compassion
sections.description: Medical volunteers help create a camp environment where families can trust that health needs are taken seriously.

sections.title: Partnership with the full team
sections.description: The role works alongside counselors, leaders, and staff so support is integrated into the whole camp rhythm.

sections.title: Confidence for families
sections.description: Visible medical support helps families feel more secure about their camper's experience.

cta.heading: If you may be a fit for the medical staff role, use the contact page to start the conversation.
cta.body: Camp relies on people with the skill and heart to help create a safer camp environment.
